description_long: This is a young adult female figure with a slender build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a sleeveless, loose-fitting top and short shorts, both of which have a casual, relaxed style. Her hair is styled in a high, voluminous ponytail with some loose strands framing her face. The figure's facial features are soft and stylized, with a slightly animated or illustrative appearance. She is barefoot, and her overall posture is upright and balanced. The model is detailed enough to show anatomical proportions and clothing folds, suitable for urban or everyday street scenes.
description: A young adult female in a sleeveless top and shorts, standing upright with arms outstretched. She has a high ponytail and a casual, relaxed appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full front of the top and shorts, with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the ponytail's volume.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, ponytail, and the back of the top and shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body and the ponytail from the opposite side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual sleeveless top and short shorts
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: long hair styled in a high ponytail with loose strands
